basic_details.job_title: ICMR RMRC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICMR Regional Medical Research Centre (ICMR RMRC) has published the Young Professional-II (IT & Electrical) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Young Professional-II positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 40 years and holding a B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical/IT/Computer Science/AI/Software Engineering qualification with 1 year of post-qualification experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 12th May 2026. Find all details about the ICMR RMRC Young Professional-II new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, walk-in details, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Young Professional- II (ELECTRICAL): Maximum age limit 40 years (Age relaxation as per ICMR guidelines) Young Professional -II (IT): Maximum age limit 40 years (Age relaxation as per ICMR guidelines)

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical or Computer Application/Information Technology/Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence/Operating Systems/Software Engineering/Computer Graphics with at least 55% marks and 1 year of post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Young Professional- II (ELECTRICAL): B.E./B.TECH (ELECTRICAL) with at least 55% marks from a recognized University/College with 1 year of post qualification experience in the related field. Young Professional -II (IT): B.Ε./B.Tech. with at least 55% marks with 1 year of post qualification experience in the related field of Computer Application/Information Technology/Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics with 1 year of post qualification experience in relevant field especially networking and web designing.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR RMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II posts at ICMR RMRC is scheduled for 12 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional-II (IT & Electrical) positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Young Professional-II (IT) post?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional-II (IT) post, candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. degree with at least 55% marks in Computer Application, Information Technology, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Operating Systems, Software Engineering, or Computer Graphics, along with 1 year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional-II posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Young Professional-II posts, with one vacancy for the Electrical discipline and one for the IT discipline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates related to educational qualification, date of birth, working experience, and category (if applicable), along with self-attested photocopies. A duly filled application form is also required.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICMR Regional Medical Research Centre (ICMR RMRC), Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to report for registration at 09:30 AM on the day of the walk-in interview, which is 12 May 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR RMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II posts at ICMR RMRC is scheduled for 12 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.
